response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance as 'Great Days' from JoJo's Bizarre Adventure. 2. Identified the performers as a group of VTubers. 3. Used the search tool to find the lyrics for 'Great Days' by the original artists, Karen Aoki and Daisuke Hasegawa. 4. Mapped the video segments into three parts: the performance (00:00-02:49), the talk (02:49-04:39), and the merch announcement (04:39-05:01). 5. Verified that the talk and merch segments do not contain vocal music.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live performance of the song 'Great Days' by a group of VTubers, followed by a talk segment and a merchandise announcement.

scenes.description: A group of VTubers (Oozora Subaru, Usada Pekora, Yukihana Lamy, Mori Calliope, and Shishiro Botan) perform the song 'Great Days' while dancing on stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: Oozora Subaru, Usada Pekora, Yukihana Lamy, Mori Calliope, and Shishiro Botan
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Shining Justice 芽生えて
Brand-new bed town 交差する息吹
岬から潮風 トンネル抜け鉄塔へ
惹かれ合い小道に迷い込む

心に 溶け込む影
照らす黄金の"Spirits"それは守り抜く光

Let the voice of love take you higher!
集まる力で時さえ超えて
1999年 Bizarre Summer
巡る勇気で生きる街
Great Days

Song of praises 響かせ
Brand new up town すれ違う景色
雲の切れ間に射す光がほら降り注ぎ
イニシエの小道へ誘い込む

煌めき導く町
たぎる黄金の"Spirits"それは果てしない絆

Let the joy of love give you an answer
別れの時さえ砕けぬ意思で
1999年 Bizarre Summer
自分乗り越え掴み取れ未来

Let the voice of love take you higher
集まるチカラで時さえ越えて

Let the joy of love give you an answer
別れの時さえ砕けぬ意思で
1999年 Bizarre Summer
交わす勇気が生む讃歌
Great Days
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Shining Justice starts to bloom
Brand-new bed town, a fresh breath arrives
A sea breeze emerges from that tunnel, heading for that tower
We're drawn to one another, losing our way down narrow lanes

A shadow melts into our hearts
Shining golden "Spirits", they are the lights that will protect us

Let the voice of love take you higher!
With this gathered power, go beyond even time
1999 Bizarre Summer
This city thrives on revolving courage
Great Days

Song of praises sounds out
Brand new up town, scenery passes by
From a break in the clouds, look, light is pouring through
Being invited into the ancient narrow lanes

A town that leads to a sparkle
Boiling golden "Spirits", they are our never-ending bonds

Let the joy of love give you an answer
With a purpose that's unbreakable even when we part
1999 Bizarre Summer
Surpassing ourselves and grabbing the future

Let the voice of love take you higher
With this gathered power, go beyond even time

Let the joy of love give you an answer
With a purpose that's unbreakable even when we part
1999 Bizarre Summer
The courage we exchange will birth our hymn
Great Days

scenes.description: Oozora Subaru talks to the audience about the performance. Background music is instrumental.
A merchandise announcement featuring images and names of the available items. No vocal music is playing.
